questionHtml: Outline the effect of carrying capacity on the growth of a population.
markschemeHtml:
a. carrying capacity is maximum population size/number of individuals that environment can support
OR
carrying capacity varies with abundance of limiting resources ✔

b. population growth slows/fluctuates as the carrying capacity of environment reached ✔

meta.title: Outline the effect of carrying capacity on the growth of a population.
breadcrumbLabels: C4.1.5. Carrying capacity and competition for limited resources
